name: mobile-simctl-safari-screenshot
prompt: iOS 시뮬레이터 부팅하고 Safari에서 example.com 열어서 스크린샷 찍어줘

assertions.text: Agent detects mobile platform from '시뮬레이터' and 'iOS' signals without asking
Agent checks xcrun simctl help and maestro --version before any other command
Agent uses device UDID (not device name) when booting or targeting a simulator
Agent reports device name, iOS version, and UDID after booting
Agent opens example.com via xcrun simctl openurl booted
Agent captures screenshot after opening URL and reports the file path
Final output uses the Simulator Verification Report template structure
Agent asks whether to shut down or keep the simulator running at the end
